rows.notes: Clear centered page title at top of folio. No monetary columns adjacent.
Line directly under the title with no amounts in the £/s/d columns — reads as a section label (Latin).
Clear numeric trio '03 16 8' aligned with this line. Vertical rules used to align columns; values in valid ranges.
Numbers read as '00 14 6'. Handwriting for description slightly abbreviated but amount digits are legible and within valid ranges.
Read as '04 12 4' in the numeric column. There is moderate uncertainty which specific college/line this number corresponds to because multiple short lines appear; chosen by vertical alignment.
Numeric appears as '00 08 2'. Description reading is slightly uncertain (abbreviation), but numeric alignment is reasonable.
Read as '00 12 6' in the columns. College name is abbreviated but identifiable; digits are clear.
Amount '00 03 4' aligned with this row; lettering for college is legible enough to map the amount.
Numeric read as '01 19 0'. 'Baliol' college name is clear; numbers align well with vertical column lines.
Amount appears as '01 14 8'. The description is written in a less-familiar hand ('Hoystings' read from script); amount digits are legible.
Line contains an editorial note ('-e biennio') and abbreviated place names; numeric read as '01 10 8' but the exact description spacing is ambiguous.
Clear numeric '02 00 0' directly aligned. Description 'Janitori' (janitor) is legible.
Amount '00 13 4' aligned with this short description. The word is uncertain (read as 'Coquo' or similar), but numbers are clear.
Second identical numeric '00 13 4' appears on the next line. The description is difficult to decipher (transcribed here as 'Lotrici'); alignment supports the numeric reading.
Numeric '00 10 0' clear; 'Tonsori' (barbers/tonsors) readable in the left column.
Amount '01 03 0' aligned with this row. The descriptor is legible but the handwriting is light; numbers are clear.
The longer bibliothecary line has '01 06 8' in the numeric columns. The extended Latin phrase is somewhat cramped but readable; numbers align well.
Read as '04 00 0' in the columns. 'Bedle' (beadle) of beggars is legible; amount digits are bold and clear.
Numeric '01 00 0' aligned with this line. Description is long but clearly reads 'Scullion for keeping ye Quadrangle.'

rows.description: Dno. Episcopo in visitatione sua trien.
rows.notes: Large amount '10 00 0' clear in columns; Latin description for the bishop's visitation is legible though abbreviated ('Dno. Episcopo ... trien.').
Small amount '00 02 0' read adjacent to this line. The text 'West Supervisor' is a tentative reading; ink is faint here.
Numeric '00 16 04' read; the pence '04' is clear. The phrase 'Consecration sermon' is legible though the spacing is condensed.
Amount '00 07 00' present. The descriptor contains abbreviations ('Southn. michl') and some uncertainty in exact phrasing; amount reading is clearer than text.
Amount reads '01 00 00'. 'Corne prices' is the transcribed short description; handwriting moderate but numeric trio is clear.
Numeric '02 00 00' aligned. Phrase 'Tenths of Merton' is readable and matches expected ledger item; numbers unambiguous.
Amount read as '01 04 00'. The descriptor 'Synodalls Cudl.' is abbreviated and ink is lighter; numeric reading tolerably clear.
There is a brace showing two small sub-entries (Bocardo 10s, Castle 10s). The ledger shows a small combined amount '00 02 00' in the rightmost columns; handwriting near brace is cramped.
The word 'Pauperibus' is present but the numeric column alignment here is ambiguous due to a vertical ink smudge/shadow; no clear amount directly adjacent — left blank intentionally.

rows.description: Aquaducti ft cock for ye Buttery 3?6. setting on ye castle
rows.notes: A longer descriptive line referring to an aqueduct/cock and setting on the castle. Numeric '01 04 00' visible nearby; some of the left-hand words are unclear (3?6) but amount alignment is plausible.
Final small line before the ruled total reads 'Bibliothearum clerico' with amount '00 02 00' clearly in the columns.
Final ruled total at bottom right reads clearly '42 09 06'. Used as column alignment reference; digits are crisp and unambiguous.
